---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Kehuan Wang"
date: "2026-04-26"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
input_dir <- "."
output_dir <- "data"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)
class_order <- c("CL0", "CL1", "CL2", "CL3", "CL4", "CL5", "CL6")

TC <- function(C) {
  N <- sum(C)
  M <- nrow(C)
  ns <- colSums(C)
  cost <- 0
  for (i in 1:M) {
    for (j in 1:M) {
      if (ns[i] == 0) next
      gamma <- (N - ns[j]) / ns[i]
      cost <- cost + C[i, j] * gamma * abs(i - j)
    }
  }
  cost
}

confusion_from_predictions <- function(y_true, y_pred, n_classes = 7) {
  C <- matrix(0, nrow = n_classes, ncol = n_classes)
  for (i in seq_along(y_true)) {
    C[y_pred[i] + 1, y_true[i] + 1] <- C[y_pred[i] + 1, y_true[i] + 1] + 1
  }
  rownames(C) <- class_order
  colnames(C) <- class_order
  C
}
accuracy_from_predictions <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  mean(y_true == y_pred)
}

evaluate_dataset <- function(label) {
  true_df <- read.csv(file.path(input_dir, paste0("multinomial_true_", label, ".csv")))
  grid_df <- read.csv(file.path(input_dir, paste0("multinomial_grid_", label, ".csv")))
  pred_df <- read.csv(file.path(input_dir, paste0("multinomial_pred_", label, ".csv")))
  y_true <- true_df$true
  pred_mat <- as.matrix(pred_df)
  results <- vector("list", nrow(grid_df))
  best_idx <- NA
  best_tc <- Inf
  best_acc <- NA
  best_alpha <- NA
  best_lambda <- NA
  best_Cmat <- NULL
  for (g in seq_len(nrow(grid_df))) {
    y_pred <- as.numeric(pred_mat[g, ])
    if (any(is.na(y_pred))) {
      results[[g]] <- data.frame(
        grid_id = grid_df$grid_id[g],
        alpha = grid_df$alpha[g],
        lambda = grid_df$lambda[g],
        log10_lambda = grid_df$log10_lambda[g],
        accuracy = NA,
        tc = NA,
        valid = FALSE
      )
      next
    }
    Cmat <- confusion_from_predictions(y_true, y_pred)
    acc <- accuracy_from_predictions(y_true, y_pred)
    tc <- TC(Cmat)
    results[[g]] <- data.frame(
      grid_id = grid_df$grid_id[g],
      alpha = grid_df$alpha[g],
      lambda = grid_df$lambda[g],
      log10_lambda = grid_df$log10_lambda[g],
      accuracy = acc,
      tc = tc,
      valid = TRUE
    )
    if (tc < best_tc) {
      best_idx <- g
      best_tc <- tc
      best_acc <- acc
      best_alpha <- grid_df$alpha[g]
      best_lambda <- grid_df$lambda[g]
      best_Cmat <- Cmat
    }
  }
  tuning_df <- do.call(rbind, results)
  write.csv(
    tuning_df,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0("multinomial_tuning_", label, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  if (!is.null(best_Cmat)) {
    write.csv(
      best_Cmat,
      file.path(output_dir, paste0("multinomial_best_confusion_matrix_", label, ".csv")),
      row.names = TRUE
    )
  }

  cat("\nDataset:", label, "\n")
  cat("Valid hyperparameter combinations:", sum(tuning_df$valid, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Best alpha:", best_alpha, "\n")
  cat("Best lambda:", best_lambda, "\n")
  cat("Best accuracy:", best_acc, "\n")
  cat("Best TC:", best_tc, "\n")
  if (!is.null(best_Cmat)) {
    print(best_Cmat)
  }
  list(
    tuning_df = tuning_df,
    best_alpha = best_alpha,
    best_lambda = best_lambda,
    best_accuracy = best_acc,
    best_tc = best_tc,
    best_confusion_matrix = best_Cmat
  )
}

plot_tc_heatmap <- function(tuning_df, title_text, output_file) {
  plot_df <- subset(tuning_df, valid == TRUE & !is.na(tc))
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = log10_lambda, y = alpha, fill = tc)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "TC") +
    labs(
      x = "log10(lambda)",
      y = "alpha",
      title = title_text
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  ggsave(output_file, p, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  print(p)
}

cat_res <- evaluate_dataset("cat")
num_res <- evaluate_dataset("num")

plot_tc_heatmap(
  cat_res$tuning_df,
  "TC for Multinomial Logistic with Elastic Net (Categorical Data)",
  file.path(output_dir, "multinomial_cat_heatmap.png")
)

plot_tc_heatmap(
  num_res$tuning_df,
  "TC for Multinomial Logistic with Elastic Net (Numeric Data)",
  file.path(output_dir, "multinomial_num_heatmap.png")
)

summary_df <- data.frame(
  data_version = c("Categorical", "Numeric"),
  best_alpha = c(cat_res$best_alpha, num_res$best_alpha),
  best_lambda = c(cat_res$best_lambda, num_res$best_lambda),
  accuracy = c(cat_res$best_accuracy, num_res$best_accuracy),
  tc = c(cat_res$best_tc, num_res$best_tc)
)

write.csv(
  summary_df,
  file.path(output_dir, "multinomial_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nSummary:\n")
print(summary_df)
```
